eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Coconino, AZ; at 11:40 AM on JUN 28, 2026 Effective until 7:40 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: URGENT from CCSO: All zones in Kachina Village and Forest Highlands REMAIN in SET status due to the Pocket Fire. PINE DEL 99 IS NOW IN SET STATUS. Residents are urged to remain aware of emerging hazards, prepare for potential evacuation orders, and stay tuned to official media sources. Click link for maps.
